name: Employee Onboarding Document Scanner
summary: Detects SSN + credit card co-occurrence in HR onboarding documents
description: Composite rule demonstrating multi-signal detection for HR onboarding workflows. Fires when BOTH an SSN and a credit card number appear in the same document, indicating a direct deposit or benefits enrollment form that requires elevated handling. Each referenced rule validates independently (SSA format check, Luhn checksum), and the composite triggers only when both signals are present.

metadata.audience: Demonstrates composite rule_ref evaluation with cross-domain detection
metadata.sample_input: New hire: Jane Doe, SSN 078-05-1120, direct deposit Visa 4539578763621486.

effect.message: Document contains SSN + credit card: route to secure HR processing
